governance_communication: Vehicle identified. Vehicle PI created. Launch communicated to domain PMs.
readiness_objectives:
Vehicle PI created.
Vehicle features identified

governance_communication: Domain PMs confirm vehicle feature scope and link Feature & Cross domain PIs.
readiness_objectives:
All Feature PIs linked.
High Complexity features Identified & Dependencies captured.
Domain impact identified.
Dependencies surfaced.
risks: Missing domain response or dependency identification.

readiness_objectives:
HLD completed
Product backlog & Scope locked down
Budget estimated (+Standard budget)
timelines:
Backlogs: 2 Months prior to CM.
HLD Completed: 2 Weeks prior to CM
The Budget estimates will be submitted at CM
risks:
No Risk register.
Activities without budget.
Backlog readiness missing.
escalation_path: Vehicle Launch PM -> Domain GPM -> VP Product.

readiness_objectives:
LLD completed, integration environment ready.
API contracts validated.
Reassess the budget to support the vehicle launch on the platform based on the LLD.
timelines: All External Party Integrations to be ready (LLD) - AT SHRM.
risks:
Risks Not Identified.
Integration environment or API readiness missing.

readiness_objectives:
Critical Services & features deployed to pre-prod and, negotiated with CVDP Lead
E2E integration validated.
Functional vehicle build available.
timelines:
Start checks T-3 weeks.
Integration baseline review T-1 week.
X0 milestone aligned with vehicle build availability.
risks: E2E integration or deployment readiness incomplete.
escalation_path: Vehicle Launch PM -> Domain GPM -> VP Product.

governance_communication: Validation by Roberto Vietti's Team before Preprod Readiness (SOP -6)
timelines: At SOP-8 (8 Months prior to SOPM)

governance_communication: Validation progress monitored with Delivery Managers.
readiness_objectives:
Critical features working E2E (Command + Telemetry + App flows).
OTA flow validated in test environment (campaign execution tested).
No open Sev1 / limited Sev2 defects on critical features
timelines: At SOP-6 (6 Months prior to SOPM)
risks:
Features working individually but failing in E2E flows.
OTA / CIAM / Subscription flows not validated together.
Defects closing late, causing compression at SOP-3.

readiness_objectives:
All services deployed in prod / pre-prod (region-ready).
OTA campaign executed successfully on pilot VINs.
End-to-end flows stable (App - Backend - Vehicle) with no Sev1 / minimal Sev2.
timelines: At SOP-3 (3 Months prior to SOPM)
risks:
Deployment done but not validated in real conditions.
OTA works in test but fails in production.
Regional / MNO gaps discovered too late.

readiness_objectives:
End-to-end customer flows working (onboarding, command, data, subscription).
Monitoring, alerting, and dashboards active.
Support readiness confirmed (call center, diagnostics, incident playbooks)
Open Road Tests Completed by LRM
timelines: At LRM (12 Weeks prior to SOPM)
risks:
Customer onboarding or app flows breaking at launch.
Monitoring / alerting gaps leading to blind spots.
Support teams not ready for real incidents.

readiness_objectives:
All services live and operational in production.
No open Sev1 / controlled Sev2 with mitigation.
Monitoring, alerting, and support fully active and responding
risks:
Production instability under real customer load.
High-severity issues impacting core features at launch.
Slow incident response due to untested ops readiness.
Production service or connectivity issues post launch.
